name: The axolotl
description: The crystalline void hums with an eternal resonance. Shards of broken realities drift like frozen waves. Bill Cipher—cracked, flickering, his eye sometimes glitching into static—paces furiously in the geometric chamber. The Axolotl, vast and serene, glows with an otherworldly blue aura, floating above the prismatic ground.
creator: harrison zavala jose john
